public.searchInputHint: Enter student code or SDMS ID (e.g. 010010001)...
public.ctaSub: Join hundreds of Rwandan schools already using Babyeyi to connect with parents and communities.
public.noCardNeeded: No credit card needed · Free for all Rwandan schools
public.demoAvailableHere: Demo video will be available here.
public.testimonialsSub: Hear from schools and parents already using Babyeyi.
public.testimonial1Quote: Babyeyi has transformed how we communicate with parents. All school information at their fingertips.
public.testimonial2Quote: As a parent, I love checking programs, fee structure, and applying for my child's admission online.
public.testimonial3Quote: The admission system saves so much time. Everything is digital, organised, and instant.
public.getStartedTitle: What Would You Like to Do?
public.getStartedSub: Modern shortcuts designed for speed, clarity, and mobile-first access.
public.getStartedCard1Desc: Tuition, requirements, and paid-at-school lines in one checkout. MTN MoMo. No account needed.
public.getStartedCard2Desc: Get your child's school kit uniforms, shoes, and stationery delivered or collected at school.
public.getStartedCard3Desc: Search 500+ schools by district, level, or TVET trade. Compare programs, fees, and facilities.
public.getStartedCard4Desc: Submit your child's admission application online and get a reference number instantly.
public.partnersSentence: by schools, families, and partners across Rwanda aligned with national education institutions and industry leaders.
public.searchPromptPayFees: See Babyeyi and pay fees for your child...
public.searchPromptUid: Look up my child's Babyeyi student UID...
public.searchPromptTrades: Get all TVET trades in the country...
public.searchErrEnterCode: Enter a student UID, code, or school directory code.
public.notifIntroSub: Receive fee reminders, attendance alerts, school announcements and reports.
public.notifSuccessSub: You'll receive reminders and school updates.
public.notifDisabledWarning: You may miss fee reminders and school announcements.
public.notifPromptSub: Parents can get reminders when school fees remain unpaid, plus updates on school activity.
public.notifPromptFee: Daily fee balance reminders with a direct pay link
public.notifPromptActivity: School activity alerts for your registered children
public.modalCheckStudentCode: Check the student UID, official code, or school directory code.
public.modalPaySplitHint: Pay School Fees covers tuition and paid-at-school items only. Pay Requirements covers school kit and other requirements.
public.modalTuitionHint: Tuition, school requirements, and paid-at-school items use your student code when asked.
public.topBannerText: New: Schools can now receive payments instantly with Babyeyi.
public.topBannerTextShort: New: Instant school payments with Babyeyi.
public.newsSectionSub: Stay updated on platform features, payment news, and school community updates.
public.newsCard1Excerpt: Schools can now receive tuition and requirement payments instantly via MTN MoMo and Airtel Money.
public.newsCard2Excerpt: Parents can order uniforms, shoes, and stationery through Babyeyi and collect at school or via agents.
public.newsCard3Excerpt: We're recruiting agents across all districts to help parents pay fees and get account support locally.
public.popupAria: Find a Babyeyi agent near you
public.popupTitle: Find a Babyeyi Agent Near You
public.popupBody: Get help with school fee payments, registration, and account support from a trusted local agent.
public.heroFindAgent: Find a Babyeyi Agent Near You
public.newsEmptySub: Check back soon for updates from Babyeyi.
public.newsCtaSub: Explore schools and pay fees online.
public.newsNewsletterSub: Get the latest Babyeyi news, product updates, and school payment tips in your inbox.
public.newsNewsletterThanks: Thank you! We will keep you updated.
public.newsCtaHint: Powered by Babyeyi — trusted school payments in Rwanda.

auth.selectPlatformSubtitle: Select the platform that matches your school - both run on Babyeyi's trusted infrastructure.
auth.liteHeadline: Smart, simple, and affordable school management
auth.liteTag: Perfect for small and growing schools that need essential daily management tools.
auth.liteDesc: Simple tools to manage students, staff, attendance, and communication from anywhere.
auth.proHeadline: Complete digital transformation for modern schools
auth.proTag: Designed for advanced schools needing finance, HR, analytics, and multi-role management.
auth.proDesc: Full power for finance, staff, discipline, payroll, reporting, and large school operations.

authLogin.accountLockedTryIn: Account locked. Try again in {{mins}} minute.
authLogin.accountLockedTryIn_other: Account locked. Try again in {{mins}} minutes.
authLogin.enterSchoolCodeExample: Enter your school code (e.g. 04001 - same as in the directory).
authLogin.schoolPendingApproval: Your school registration is pending approval. Please wait for the Super Admin to activate your school.
authLogin.schoolInactive: Your school is inactive. Please contact the Super Admin to activate it.
authLogin.schoolNotLinked: No school is linked to this account. Please contact the Super Admin.
authLogin.schoolCodeRequired: Enter your school code to sign in as School Manager.
authLogin.systemMaintenanceOnlySuper: System maintenance - only Super Administrator can sign in.
authLogin.schoolUsesPro: Your school uses ShuleManager Pro. Sign in from the Pro portal.
authLogin.schoolUsesLite: Your school is on ShuleManager Lite. Use the Lite portal to sign in.
authLogin.cannotSignInPro: This account cannot sign in through ShuleManager Pro.
authLogin.cannotConnectServer: Cannot connect to server. Is it running on port 5100?
authLogin.otherPortalSub: Sign in for agents, district officers, NESA, platform admins, and Shule Avance partners.
authLogin.useTeacherPortal: Teachers should sign in through the Teacher portal (ticha.babyeyi.rw).
authLogin.useParentPortal: Parents should use Parent Login from the homepage.
authLogin.useShuleManagerLite: School staff should sign in through ShuleManager Lite.
authLogin.useShuleManager: School managers should sign in through ShuleManager.
authLogin.wrongPortalOther: This account cannot sign in here. Use the correct portal for your role.
authLogin.signInToContinue: Sign in to continue to your portal
authLogin.maintenanceModeBanner: Maintenance mode: only Super Administrator or Full System Controller accounts can sign in.
authLogin.systemChangesRestrictedBanner: System changes are restricted. You can still sign in and browse.
authLogin.schoolCodeNoteStaff: Required for school staff; leave blank for Super Admin / NESA / DEO
authLogin.schoolCodeNoteManager: Required - same code as in the school directory
authLogin.accountTemporarilyLocked: Account temporarily locked. Try again in 30 minutes.
authLogin.allInOnePlatform: All in one platform for smarter education.

servicePage.sectionSub: Open any service to see details, then pay with a student code - no login required.
servicePage.shulekitDesc: Choose a Babyeyi standard kit by grade, or follow your school's custom list - same secure flow as paying fees by school.
servicePage.shulekitImageAlt: ShuleKit - standard and custom school kits
servicePage.agentPopupSub: Contact us or request support near your location.
servicePage.bridgeSub: After choosing ShuleKit, you can quickly continue to other Babyeyi services for your learner in one secure experience.
servicePage.premiumCtaSub: Simplify school management, payments, attendance, vouchers, and all reporting through one digital system.

shulecard.title: ShuleCard
shulecard.desc: A digital tool that helps students manage transactions using an NFC wristband or card.

shuleshoe.title: Shoes Voucher
shuleshoe.desc: Access and redeem your school shoes securely through the system.

uniform.title: Uniform Voucher
uniform.desc: Access and redeem your school uniform securely through the system.

mybabyeyi.title: My Babyeyi Account
mybabyeyi.desc: Your family dashboard for tracking all services and payments in one place.

paidschool.title: Paid at School
paidschool.desc: Easily pay school fees and school items through the portal.

requirementsOnly.title: Requirements Only
requirementsOnly.desc: Pay your student's school requirements quickly and easily with Babyeyi

papeterie.title: Shule Papeterie
papeterie.desc: Stationery and learning materials, fast and convenient.

featuresPage.heroSub: A complete digital platform built for speed, trust, and accessibility across Rwanda.
featuresPage.grid1Desc: Every school gets a professional website with branding, domain slug, and full content management.
featuresPage.grid2Desc: Parents follow school updates, view announcements, track programs, and stay connected daily.
featuresPage.grid3Desc: A-Level combos, TVET trades, education levels, and detailed curriculum, fully searchable.
featuresPage.grid4Desc: Schools post important dates and events that reach parents and community instantly.
featuresPage.grid5Desc: Find any school in Rwanda by name, district, sector, education level, or TVET trade.
featuresPage.grid6Desc: Custom admission forms. Students apply online and receive reference numbers instantly.
featuresPage.grid7Desc: Fee structures, leadership teams, and school details are public and always up to date.
featuresPage.grid8Desc: Secure data handling, reliable uptime, and a mobile-first design built for Rwanda.
featuresPage.grid9Desc: Every school website is fully responsive for phones, tablets, and desktop users.
featuresPage.grid10Desc: Parents pay school fees by school code, no account required, mobile-money powered.
featuresPage.grid11Desc: Students access their online service dashboard to view profile details and school-linked information.
featuresPage.grid12Desc: Educational tools and stationery, standard or school-custom, delivered to families.
featuresPage.grid13Desc: In-platform assistant guiding parents and schools through payments, admissions, and support.
featuresPage.ctaSub: Create your school profile, publish your mini-website, and open payments and admissions in one place.
featuresPage.footerMadeWithLove: Made with love for Rwanda's schools

agentShopCheckout.title: Agent Shop Checkout
agentShopCheckout.errRequired: Student code, name and contact are required.

invoiceVerify.title: Babyeyi Invoice Verification
invoiceVerify.subtitle: Scan result from invoice QR code
invoiceVerify.existsInRecords: This invoice exists in Babyeyi records.
invoiceVerify.copyFailed: Copy failed. Please copy from address bar.

uniformVoucher.title: Uniform Voucher
uniformVoucher.heroSub: Order school uniforms easily for your child - from lookup to delivery, in one calm flow.
uniformVoucher.priceNote: Prices may vary depending on selected items and sizes.
uniformVoucher.whatYouCanOrderSub: Clear categories, real line items, and sizes - built for parents who want speed without guesswork.
uniformVoucher.quote: We want every parent to feel confident that the right uniform reaches the right student - with Babyeyi tracking from payment to delivery.
uniformVoucher.readyToStartSub: Enter your student code, pick items, choose delivery, then pay securely.
uniformVoucher.highlights1Text: Shirts, skirts, trousers, sweaters, and more.
uniformVoucher.highlights2Text: PE kits, tracksuits, and sports shoes.
uniformVoucher.highlights3Text: We load student, school, and location for you.
uniformVoucher.highlights4Text: Deliver to school or to your home address.
uniformVoucher.highlights5Text: Mobile money and tracked Babyeyi orders.
uniformVoucher.highlights6Text: Order number, voucher, and status updates.
uniformVoucher.benefit1: Saves busy parents time at the start of term
uniformVoucher.benefit2: Reduces mistakes when choosing uniform pieces
uniformVoucher.benefit4: Clear pricing per item - totals update automatically
